rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court to determine if minor errors and discrepancies may be waived or addressed in open court in order for the estate to close. (The accounting period exceeding the limits this Court ordinarily allows is accepted in light of the appeal. Counsel should take note, however, for future. [LRSF 14.34 A.]) Due to COVID-19, counsel and parties should appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall whenever possible. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: Meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. PARTIES APPEARING MUST CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING USING THEIR FULL NAME.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF YU FUNG MAK
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/22/22. Notice is defective if mailed before the filing of the pleading requiring notice. Although file stamped on 5/31/22, the third report of status was not actually e-filed until 6/2/22, when it was first available to be viewed on the Court's website. Notice of the 11/22/22 hearing must be given at least 15 days before 11/22/22. An appearance will likely be required on 11/22/22, as the six months requested in this petition signed by the administrator on 6/1/22 will have nearly been reached by 11/22/22. (If the property cannot be sold, the administrator might consider requesting distribution of the property to the five heirs; they can then sell the property as the co-owners.) Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALBERT SAMARIS SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST, DATED OCTOBER 15, 2004
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/15/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. Please re-do notice on the Notice of hearing form as the provided notice does not include the required language found in Local Rule 14.1 D. 6) File stamped single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a file stamped courtesy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. File stamped courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. A hard copy of the proposed order must be provided to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BROWN FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Modifying Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/21/2022 by judicial officer. 1. Please address why San Francisco is the proper venue is more detail as it appear this trust was already amended in Santa Clara and the Trustee's address appears to be a hotel. 2. Please explain the current trust structure after the 2010 court order. 3. The court will like an independent attorney appointed as GAL for the minor beneficaries. 4. Please explain why the settlor/trustee is seeking appointment/removal (for any reason) powers over a trust that she appears to have disclaimed. A file stamped single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/7/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHUANG MEI LIU
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/22/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The amended petition was filed on 9/13/22, but not actually e-filed until 9/19/22, when it was first available to be viewed. Notice is defective if mailed before the filing of the pleading requiring notice. The proof of service filed on 9/13/22 shows that notice of the petition, not the amended petition, was mailed on 8/2/22 for this hearing. The notice must clearly indicate that an amended petition will be heard. Item 3a of the amended petition is incomplete. No proof of publication of notice of the amended petition has been filed yet. [CRC 7.53(a).] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/10/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MALCOLM DAVID GUTTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RONALD LAMONTE BELL

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/01/22 for failure to address prior tentative ruling. All required documents to be filed and provided by 10/17/22. Note: tentative ruling continuances are final and uncontestable and are not subject to Local Rule 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF IVAN ISRAEL MAGANA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/15/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1. The filed notice of hearing does not include the required language found in Local Rule 14.1. D. 6) and must be re-done. 2. Petitioners name, relationship to decedent, age, and address are not listed on attachment 8. 3. No declinations to serve or nominations have been filed. 4. Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed with a cover page, separately, and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] A file stamped single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/31/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/15/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1. If a will names a trust or trustee as a devisee, the trustee(s) must be clearly identified in item 8. [LRSF 14.18 C. 2)] 2. Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed with a cover page, separately, and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form.[LRSF 14.18 E.] A file stamped single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/31/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
